description: The pie chart only displays 6 of the 15 countries, yet each slice's percentage is calculated relative to the sum of all 15 countries' values — causing the displayed percentages to sum to only about 47% rather than 100%. This misleads viewers into thinking these slices represent tiny fractions of a meaningful whole, when in reality homicide rates are independent measurements that have no legitimate part-to-whole relationship to begin with, making a pie chart entirely inappropriate for this data.
